requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz; Mixed Plug Types (A/B/C/D/F/G)

summary.en: Myanmar's electricity supply grid operates at 230 V AC, 50 Hz. Unlike most countries with a single dominant plug type, Myanmar has an extremely mixed plug ecosystem inherited from colonial history and regional influence: Types A (US-style 2-flat-pin), B (US-style 3-pin), C (European 2-round-pin), D (large round 3-pin, Indian-origin), F (Schuko), and G (UK-style 3-rectangular-pin) are all present, with Types A and C being the most commonly encountered in practice. Wireless devices and chargers must accommodate this mixed environment and must carry a voltage rating of 220-240 V or 100-240 V to operate safely. Myanmar does not operate a mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to CCC; IEC 62368-1-based test reports are the accepted international reference for product safety. Compliance documentation referencing IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 and confirming 230 V / 50 Hz compatibility should be retained for customs and importer reference.
summary.zh: 缅甸电网运行电压为230V交流、50Hz。与大多数拥有单一主流插头类型的国家不同，缅甸因殖民历史和地区影响而形成了极其混杂的插头生态：A型（美式双扁平脚）、B型（美式三脚）、C型（欧式双圆脚）、D型（印度来源大圆三脚）、F型（德式Schuko）和G型（英式三矩形脚）均有使用，其中A型和C型实践中最为常见。无线设备及充电器须适应这一混合环境，且电压额定值须达到220-240V或100-240V方可安全运行。缅甸尚无等同于CCC的强制性上市前电气安全认证制度；基于IEC 62368-1的检测报告为产品安全的公认国际参考依据。建议保留引用IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1并确认230V/50Hz兼容性的合规文件，供海关和进口商参考。
summary.zht: 緬甸電網運行電壓為230V交流、50Hz。與大多數擁有單一主流插頭類型的國家不同，緬甸因殖民歷史和地區影響而形成了極其混雜的插頭生態：A型（美式雙扁平腳）、B型（美式三腳）、C型（歐式雙圓腳）、D型（印度來源大圓三腳）、F型（德式Schuko）和G型（英式三矩形腳）均有使用，其中A型和C型實踐中最為常見。無線設備及充電器須適應這一混合環境，且電壓額定值須達到220-240V或100-240V方可安全運行。緬甸尚無等同於CCC的強制性上市前電氣安全認證制度；基於IEC 62368-1的檢測報告為產品安全的公認國際參考依據。建議保留引用IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1並確認230V/50Hz相容性的合規文件，供海關和進口商參考。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2018 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment: Safety requirements (international reference standard used in Myanmar)
IEC 60950-1 — IT equipment safety (legacy reference, superseded by IEC 62368-1)
Myanmar Standards Law 2015 — statutory basis for standards adoption

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for IT and audio/video equipment is mandatory under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme governed by GB 4943.1-2022 (which adopts IEC 62368-1:2018 with Chinese deviations), administered by CNCA/SAMR. China's grid is 220 V nominal, 50 Hz; plug type is exclusively Type A/I (two-flat-pin). CCC certification does not confer any recognition in Myanmar and is a domestic Chinese requirement only.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及音视频设备的电气安全依据强制性3C认证（CCC）制度，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会/市场监管总局管理，执行GB 4943.1-2022（采纳IEC 62368-1:2018并有中国偏差）。中国电网标称电压220V、50Hz；插头类型仅为A/I型（双扁平脚）。CCC认证在缅甸不具任何认可效力，仅为中国境内要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據強制性3C認證（CCC）制度，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會/市場監管總局管理，執行GB 4943.1-2022（採納IEC 62368-1:2018並有中國偏差）。中國電網標稱電壓220V、50Hz；插頭類型僅為A/I型（雙扁平腳）。CCC認證在緬甸不具任何認可效力，僅為中國境內要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Information technology equipment safety (adopts IEC 62368-1:2018 with Chinese deviations); mandatory CCC from 1 August 2023
CCC (China Compulsory Certification, 3C) — mandatory pre-market safety scheme administered by CNCA/SAMR

gap.en: Myanmar operates at 230 V / 50 Hz versus China's 220 V nominal / 50 Hz. Devices must carry a voltage rating of at least 220-240 V or 100-240 V (universal input) to be safe for Myanmar use. Most Chinese-export products are already rated 100-240 V, but chargers and power supplies should be verified. Myanmar has no mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to CCC; IEC 62368-1 test reports are the accepted international reference. Myanmar's highly mixed plug environment (Types A/B/C/D/F/G) means that universal power supplies or appropriate plug adapters are essential. CCC certification does not transfer to Myanmar. Retain IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1 for legacy products) test reports for customs and importer reference.
gap.zh: 缅甸运行电压为230V/50Hz，而中国为标称220V/50Hz。设备电压额定值须至少覆盖220-240V或100-240V（通用输入），方可在缅甸安全使用。大多数面向出口的中国产品已额定100-240V，但充电器和电源适配器需逐一核实。缅甸无等同于CCC的强制上市前电气安全认证制度；IEC 62368-1检测报告为公认的国际参考依据。缅甸高度混合的插头环境（A/B/C/D/F/G型）意味着通用电源或合适的插头转换器不可或缺。CCC认证在缅甸不可转用。请保留IEC 62368-1（或传统产品的IEC 60950-1）检测报告供海关和进口商参考。
gap.zht: 緬甸運行電壓為230V/50Hz，而中國為標稱220V/50Hz。設備電壓額定值須至少覆蓋220-240V或100-240V（通用輸入），方可在緬甸安全使用。大多數面向出口的中國產品已額定100-240V，但充電器和電源適配器需逐一核實。緬甸無等同於CCC的強制上市前電氣安全認證制度；IEC 62368-1檢測報告為公認的國際參考依據。緬甸高度混合的插頭環境（A/B/C/D/F/G型）意味著通用電源或合適的插頭轉換器不可或缺。CCC認證在緬甸不可轉用。請保留IEC 62368-1（或傳統產品的IEC 60950-1）檢測報告供海關和進口商參考。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to CCC as of 2026-06-17 — IEC 62368-1 compliance is the accepted international reference; verify 230 V / 50 Hz rating and plug compatibility; Myanmar grid and mixed plug types require universal-voltage products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification under GB 4943.1-2022 required before sale in China for mains-powered IT and AV equipment (CNCA/SAMR)

source.publisher: Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (MCIT), Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar operates at 230 V / 50 Hz with a highly mixed plug environment (Types A/B/C/D/F/G). No mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to CCC exists in Myanmar as of 2026-06-17. Products must carry a voltage rating covering 230 V. Retain IEC 62368-1 test reports for customs reference. Chinese CCC certification does not transfer. Universal-input power supplies are strongly advised given Myanmar's plug diversity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸电网为230V/50Hz，插头环境高度混合（A/B/C/D/F/G型）。截至2026年6月17日，缅甸尚无等同于CCC的强制上市前电气安全认证制度。产品电压额定值须覆盖230V。请保留IEC 62368-1检测报告供海关参考。中国CCC认证在缅甸不可转用。鉴于缅甸插头的多样性，强烈建议使用通用输入电源适配器。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸電網為230V/50Hz，插頭環境高度混合（A/B/C/D/F/G型）。截至2026年6月17日，緬甸尚無等同於CCC的強制上市前電氣安全認證制度。產品電壓額定值須覆蓋230V。請保留IEC 62368-1檢測報告供海關參考。中國CCC認證在緬甸不可轉用。鑒於緬甸插頭的多樣性，強烈建議使用通用輸入電源適配器。
